provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien: any person who does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is in illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess risk of absconding.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three identification criteria.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

absconding_risk_is_current_and_real.name: absconding_risk_is_current_and_real
absconding_risk_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding for the person, based on individual examination and objective criteria.

criterion_no_residence_application_after.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
criterion_no_residence_application_after.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

criterion_false_information_or_documents.name: criterion_false_information_or_documents
criterion_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false/falsified documents, or committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

criterion_non_compliance_with_measures.name: criterion_non_compliance_with_measures
criterion_non_compliance_with_measures.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

criterion_subject_of_entry_ban.name: criterion_subject_of_entry_ban
criterion_subject_of_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_new_application_after_negative.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_new_application_after_negative.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application there.

criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_concealed_prior_protection_app.name: criterion_concealed_prior_protection_application
criterion_concealed_prior_protection_app.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_.name: criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding risk criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.
